creator: portmaster@bsdforge.com
text:
HAH! I was right; it IS caused by the new STAGEing system.
When will this be removed? STAGEing, that is.

Here is the fix:

cd /usr/ports/dns/yadifa
make -DNO_STAGE
make -DNO_STAGE install

if build, and install is performed in the order, and method
described above. This port will install w/o error.

Best wishes.

--Chris
